# awscc_securityagent_agent_space (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::SecurityAgent::AgentSpace



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `agent_space_id` (String) Unique identifier of the agent space
- `aws_resources` (Attributes) AWS resource configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aws_resources))
- `code_review_settings` (Attributes) Details of code review settings (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--code_review_settings))
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the agent space was created
- `description` (String) Description of the agent space
- `integrated_resources` (Attributes List) Integrated Resources configuration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--integrated_resources))
- `kms_key_id` (String) Identifier of the KMS key used to encrypt data. Can be a key ID, key ARN, alias name, or alias ARN. If not specified, an AWS managed key is used.
- `name` (String) Name of the agent space
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags for the agent space (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `target_domain_ids` (List of String) List of target domain identifiers registered with the agent space
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the agent space was last updated

<a id="nestedatt--aws_resources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `aws_resources`

Read-Only:

- `iam_roles` (List of String) IAM role ARNs
- `lambda_function_arns` (List of String) Lambda function ARNs used to retrieve tester credentials for pentests
- `log_groups` (List of String) CloudWatch log group ARNs
- `s3_buckets` (List of String) S3 bucket ARNs
- `secret_arns` (List of String) SecretsManager secret ARNs used to store tester credentials for pentests
- `vpcs` (Attributes List) VPC configurations (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--aws_resources--vpcs))

<a id="nestedatt--aws_resources--vpcs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `aws_resources.vpcs`

Read-Only:

- `security_group_arns` (List of String) List of security group ARNs in the customer VPC
- `subnet_arns` (List of String) List of subnet ARNs in the customer VPC
- `vpc_arn` (String) ARN of the customer VPC



<a id="nestedatt--code_review_settings"></a>
### Nested Schema for `code_review_settings`

Read-Only:

- `controls_scanning` (Boolean) Whether Controls are utilized for code review analysis
- `general_purpose_scanning` (Boolean) Whether general purpose analysis is performed for code review


<a id="nestedatt--integrated_resources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `integrated_resources`

Read-Only:

- `integration` (String) Unique identifier of the Provider Integration
- `provider_resources` (Attributes List) List of selected Resources from the Integration (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--integrated_resources--provider_resources))

<a id="nestedatt--integrated_resources--provider_resources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `integrated_resources.provider_resources`

Read-Only:

- `git_hub_capabilities` (Attributes) GitHub repository capabilities (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--integrated_resources--provider_resources--git_hub_capabilities))
- `git_hub_repository` (Attributes) GitHub repository details (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--integrated_resources--provider_resources--git_hub_repository))

<a id="nestedatt--integrated_resources--provider_resources--git_hub_capabilities"></a>
### Nested Schema for `integrated_resources.provider_resources.git_hub_capabilities`

Read-Only:

- `leave_comments` (Boolean) Enables Code Review in the repository
- `remediate_code` (Boolean) Enables creation of pull requests with automated fixes


<a id="nestedatt--integrated_resources--provider_resources--git_hub_repository"></a>
### Nested Schema for `integrated_resources.provider_resources.git_hub_repository`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) GitHub repository name
- `owner` (String) GitHub repository owner (user or organization)




<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) The key name of the tag
- `value` (String) The value for the tag
